replies.msg:
https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/features/inside-disneys-bold-200m-gamble-mulan-stakes-couldnt-be-higher-1280999

In August, Liu stirred up a major controversy when she reposted a pro-police comment on Chinese platform Weibo (where she has more than 66 million followers) at the height of the violence in Hong Kong. Her action was seen by critics of the Chinese government as supporting police brutality; soon after, the hashtag #BoycottMulan started trending on Twitter. Liu, who has American co-citizenship from her time in the U.S., was harshly criticized around the world for supporting oppression.

"I think it's obviously a very complicated situation and I'm not an expert," she says now, cautious in the extreme. "I just really hope this gets resolved soon." When pressed, Liu, whose answer seemed rehearsed, declines to say much more, simply repeating, "I think it's just a very sensitive situation." (Bailey also deflects when asked: "Yifei's politics are her own, and we are just focused on the movie and her performance.")

replies.msg: 正想講

Mulan is the first Chinese story movie in Disney. However, this movie is a representation of Chinese culture, as we know, it is a social construction of reality. All media representation has ideologies behind it (Artz & Murphy, 2000). We can see that the movie is going to promote and uphold the Chinese value which is about filial piety and positive character. Also, the main character of this movie is Chinese people Crystal Liu. I think the movie and Disneyland is going to revalue the rebellion. We can easily imagine the purpose is that keeping a good image and Maintain stability from China government. Recently, some of the state in China such as Xinjiang, Hong Kong. People who live there hoping to protect their human right, therefore, it is a good evidence to ensure my argument. In the movie, Disneyland portray her characters to a robotic warrior, it is so-called the values of Chinese nationalism.

In August, Liu stirred up a major controversy when she reposted a pro-police comment on Chinese platform Weibo (where she has more than 66 million followers) at the height of the violence in Hong Kong. Her action was seen by critics of the Chinese government as supporting police brutality; soon after, the hashtag #BoycottMulan started trending on Twitter. Liu, who has American co-citizenship from her time in the U.S., was harshly criticized around the world for supporting oppression.

"I think it's obviously a very complicated situation and I'm not an expert," she says now, cautious in the extreme. "I just really hope this gets resolved soon." When pressed, Liu, whose answer seemed rehearsed, declines to say much more, simply repeating, "I think it's just a very sensitive situation." (Bailey also deflects when asked: "Yifei's politics are her own, and we are just focused on the movie and her performance.")

replies.msg:
顯然，本片非常注重中國的票房市場。去年因為對香港問題的表態，劉亦菲和花木蘭遭到了海外不少網友的抵制，對此，劉亦菲首次公開做出回應，她說：“我認為這是一個非常複雜的情況，而且我也不是專家。我只是希望這個問題能夠盡快解決。我認為這是一個非常敏感的情況。”

THR指出，內地影迷也會因為劉亦菲的表態而在票房上支持這部《花木蘭》。並表示本片實際上靈感更多是來自傳統的木蘭故事，而並非迪士尼動畫電影。而且為了本片故事，導演導演Niki Caro曾多次來訪中國，甚至找來歷史軍事研究專家等十多位專家進行交流，並研究《木蘭辭》。

本片首支預告片出現了福建土樓，史學界一般認為福建土樓始建於明朝嘉靖年間，與花木蘭所處年代相距甚遠。對此，知名製作人江志強表示“沒必要太在意歷史的準確性，花木蘭雖然出名，但畢竟是虛構的，並非歷史人物。”

迪士尼為本片在中國進行了內部試映，尤其包括迪士尼的中國高管參加了試映。在早期版本里，木蘭和陳洪輝有一場橋上的吻別戲，導演Niki Caro表示儘管這場戲非常美，但中國這邊給出的意見是“不能這麼拍，對於中國觀眾來說不合適。”所以就刪掉了。

導演也期待著本片在中國票房大獲成功，“因為這就是屬於中國的故事。”

quote.msg: 有冇中文報導擺返上微搏: 劉亦菲收回支持警察言論 自言香港情況複雜 對抗爭事件不了解

顯然，本片非常注重中國的票房市場。去年因為對香港問題的表態，劉亦菲和花木蘭遭到了海外不少網友的抵制，對此，劉亦菲首次公開做出回應，她說：“我認為這是一個非常複雜的情況，而且我也不是專家。我只是希望這個問題能夠盡快解決。我認為這是一個非常敏感的情況。”

THR指出，內地影迷也會因為劉亦菲的表態而在票房上支持這部《花木蘭》。並表示本片實際上靈感更多是來自傳統的木蘭故事，而並非迪士尼動畫電影。而且為了本片故事，導演導演Niki Caro曾多次來訪中國，甚至找來歷史軍事研究專家等十多位專家進行交流，並研究《木蘭辭》。

本片首支預告片出現了福建土樓，史學界一般認為福建土樓始建於明朝嘉靖年間，與花木蘭所處年代相距甚遠。對此，知名製作人江志強表示“沒必要太在意歷史的準確性，花木蘭雖然出名，但畢竟是虛構的，並非歷史人物。”

迪士尼為本片在中國進行了內部試映，尤其包括迪士尼的中國高管參加了試映。在早期版本里，木蘭和陳洪輝有一場橋上的吻別戲，導演Niki Caro表示儘管這場戲非常美，但中國這邊給出的意見是“不能這麼拍，對於中國觀眾來說不合適。”所以就刪掉了。

導演也期待著本片在中國票房大獲成功，“因為這就是屬於中國的故事。”

THR指出，內地影迷也會因為劉亦菲的表態而在票房上支持這部《花木蘭》。並表示本片實際上靈感更多是來自傳統的木蘭故事，而並非迪士尼動畫電影。而且為了本片故事，導演導演Niki Caro曾多次來訪中國，甚至找來歷史軍事研究專家等十多位專家進行交流，並研究《木蘭辭》。

本片首支預告片出現了福建土樓，史學界一般認為福建土樓始建於明朝嘉靖年間，與花木蘭所處年代相距甚遠。對此，知名製作人江志強表示“沒必要太在意歷史的準確性，花木蘭雖然出名，但畢竟是虛構的，並非歷史人物。”

導演也期待著本片在中國票房大獲成功，“因為這就是屬於中國的故事。”

https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/features/inside-disneys-bold-200m-gamble-mulan-stakes-couldnt-be-higher-1280999

In August, Liu stirred up a major controversy when she reposted a pro-police comment on Chinese platform Weibo (where she has more than 66 million followers) at the height of the violence in Hong Kong. Her action was seen by critics of the Chinese government as supporting police brutality; soon after, the hashtag #BoycottMulan started trending on Twitter. Liu, who has American co-citizenship from her time in the U.S., was harshly criticized around the world for supporting oppression.

"I think it's obviously a very complicated situation and I'm not an expert," she says now, cautious in the extreme. "I just really hope this gets resolved soon." When pressed, Liu, whose answer seemed rehearsed, declines to say much more, simply repeating, "I think it's just a very sensitive situation." (Bailey also deflects when asked: "Yifei's politics are her own, and we are just focused on the movie and her performance.")

quote.msg: Mulan is the first Chinese story movie in Disney. However, this movie is a representation of Chinese culture, as we know, it is a social construction of reality. All media representation has ideologies behind it (Artz & Murphy, 2000). We can see that the movie is going to promote and uphold the Chinese value which is about filial piety and positive character. Also, the main character of this movie is Chinese people Crystal Liu. I think the movie and Disneyland is going to revalue the rebellion. We can easily imagine the purpose is that keeping a good image and Maintain stability from China government. Recently, some of the state in China such as Xinjiang, Hong Kong. People who live there hoping to protect their human right, therefore, it is a good evidence to ensure my argument. In the movie, Disneyland portray her characters to a robotic warrior, it is so-called the values of Chinese nationalism.
